title: Add gomod instructions and mailing list links
body:
Added instructions for how to use go mod to vendor in the contributing.md file.

Also added a few links to the Buildah mailing list.



Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: First Go Mod attempt, buyer beware!  @vrothberg PTAL
Not sure how to restart Cirrus here (it flaked). Other than that, LGTM
@TomSweeneyRedHat Was there a reason that my PR was not merged and you opened this one?
@rhatdan cause I'm a dope and thought you'd updated libpod but not buildah?
I'll get you're merged in, then will revamp this one for the updated doc.
Rebased after #1701 went through and changed the title/description to remove the vendor component of the original.
@TomSweeneyRedHat No problem, I just thought I missed something.
